title: MarketEventV1
description: Canonical market event contract for Binance analytics pipeline.

schema_version.description: Contract version used by all modules.

symbol.description: Trading pair symbol, for example BTCUSDT.

event_time.description: Event timestamp from source in epoch milliseconds.

price.description: Price value encoded as decimal string for precision safety.

quantity.description: Quantity value encoded as decimal string for precision safety.

trade_id.description: Trade id when available from source.

is_buyer_maker.description: Binance trade side flag when available.

bid_price.description: Best bid price when event_type is book_ticker.

bid_qty.description: Best bid quantity when event_type is book_ticker.

ask_price.description: Best ask price when event_type is book_ticker.

ask_qty.description: Best ask quantity when event_type is book_ticker.
